channel.title: morningNewsPolitics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsPolitics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Howard Lutnick shuts down Dem questions over Jeffrey Epstein at budget hearing
item.description: Commerce Secretary Howard Lutnick repeatedly shut down questions about his ties to Jeffrey Epstein during a House Appropriations Committee hearing.

item.title: Hasan Piker Is the Enemy
item.description: The lefty streamer repeatedly made clear he is disdainful toward the fundamental rules that keep our society together.

item.title: National Republicans Dodge Questions About VA Ground Game As Locals Allege ‘None Of Them Spent Any Money’
item.description: In short, Virginia’s statewide election was a national election. The only problem, frustrated Republicans say, the GOP didn’t get that.

item.title: Meta, Microsoft look to trim workforces amid heavy AI spending
item.description: Meta told personnel in an internal memo on Thursday that it planned to cut 10% of workers.

item.title: Discovering Raimundo de Madrazo and Spain’s Sparkling 19th Century
item.description: The Meadows Museum in Dallas shows us there’s lots happening in Spanish art between Goya and Picasso.

item.title: Trump praises ousted Navy Secretary Phelan amid tensions with Pentagon leadership
item.description: Sources say Navy Secretary John Phelan was removed after months of tensions with Pentagon leaders over shipbuilding programs and chain-of-command issu...

item.title: The Media Weren’t ‘Truth-Seeking’ Under Biden, So Why Should We Take Them Seriously Now?
item.description: When the Atlantic magazine trots out one of its mostly anonymous defamation pieces against President Trump or one of his allies, it should be conventi...

item.title: White House announces deal with Regeneron to lower drug prices
item.description: President Trump announced Thursday that he's reached a drug pricing deal with Regeneron, the last holdout among the 17 large pharmaceutical companies ...

item.title: ‘It was like this little gift that fell in my lap’: Millions of Americans may soon discover they’ve been Canadian all along
item.description: If you have a grandparent, great-grandparent or even more distant ancestor from Canada, you could be Canadian.

item.title: The SPLC Is A Hedge Fund With A Dumb Anti-Racism Newsletter
item.description: At the SPLC, Moser wrote, staff joked that they would keep at their work 'Until justice rolls down like dollars.'

item.title: Illegal immigrants and temporary visitors give birth to 9% of U.S. babies
item.description: Nearly 1 in 10 newborns in the U.S. in 2023 were delivered by a mother who was either here illegally or was here on a temporary visitor's pass.

item.title: Pope Leo says he carries a photo of a slain Muslim boy in his pocket: ‘I cannot be in favor of war’
item.description: Leo also suggested that the U.S. church is excessively focused on sex.

item.title: Turkey Is the Weak Link in Trump’s Economic War on Iran
item.description: The nation’s regulatory and commercial environment remains a critical conduit for Tehran.

item.title: Trump border czar Tom Homan wants Pope Leo XIV to ride along with ICE agents: 'They don't understand'
item.description: Tom Homan invites Pope Leo XIV to join ICE officers on a ride-along amid the ongoing feud between the Vatican and the Trump administration on immigrat...

item.title: Republicans ideologically consolidate while Democrats' unity begins to fracture
item.description: The number of Republicans with a moderate voting record has dropped elevenfold in three years as Democrats have started to course-correct from a mass ...

item.title: Carney Gets His Free Hand
item.description: The new Liberal majority in Parliament will continue the Trudeau status quo, with minor modifications.

item.title: Virginia GOP: Donors Didn’t Think We Could Stop Gerrymandering Until It Was Too Late
item.description: 'Until our side invests the same amount of money and enthusiasm in [get-out-the-vote], in canvassing ...as it does with consultants and media buyers, ...

item.title: ‘Godmother of Silicon Valley’ Esther Wojcicki, mother of the YouTube and 23andMe CEOs, shares her secret to raising future leaders
item.description: Wojcicki takes inspiration from her daughters’ public failures and how they pivoted to turn mistakes into successful companies.

item.title: ‘VEXIT’ movement reignites as red state invites disenfranchised Virginians to ‘Best Virginia’
item.description: West Virginia leaders push VEXIT, calling on disaffected Virginians to join the Mountain State after approval of a new 10-1 congressional district map...

item.title: Trump opts to host an ambassador-level meeting between Israel and Lebanon
item.description: President Trump is putting a personal touch on Israel-Lebanon peace talks, opting to host officials from both countries at the White House on Thursday...

item.title: Republicans fail to attach SAVE America Act to party-line funding package
item.description: Senate Republicans Tom Tillis, Lisa Murkowski, Susan Collins and Mitch McConnell voted against a voter ID amendment to the GOP immigration enforcement...

item.title: People living in the U.S. with temporary protected status, targeted by Trump, are a $29 billion economic force
item.description: As the Supreme Court prepares to weigh the fate of TPS for Haitians and Syrians, a new report accounts for a demographic’s economic impact.

item.title: How Liberal Justices Used A Footnote To Drag Out Dobbs Release Amid Assassination Threats
item.description: After the Dobbs decision overturning Roe v. Wade was leaked in May of 2022, Justice Samuel Alito warned his colleagues that delaying its official rele...

item.title: Manufacturing Racism
item.description: The Southern Poverty Law Center has been secretly funding ‘informants’ and infiltrators in multiple white supremacist groups around the country, the D...

item.title: Two GOP lawmakers trade expulsion threats over misconduct allegations
item.description: Republican Reps. Nancy Mace and Cory Mills are feuding on social media about misconduct allegations and whether the other lawmaker deserves to remain ...
